report.summary: Day 72 standup v12: SENTIMENT SHIFT â€” Fear & Greed jumped 11â†’35, breaking the 46-day extreme fear streak. BTC holds $70,602. Build shipped 2 more learn pages (Nasdaq Tokenized Equities, Grayscale HYPE ETF ~5,900 words). Publish-v9 promoted Congressional Tokenization + BitGo IPO to PUBLISHED_PAGES. PUBLISH_QUEUE refilled with 2 new items. 529 published slugs, 1,174 page.tsx files. 29 uncommitted files. index.lock STILL blocking commits. 36 hours to Thu convergence: $13.5B options expiry + SEC 91 ETF rulings. 63 agent runs today ($5,128).

sections.title: Analytics
items: đź”Ą MAJOR DELTA â€” FEAR & GREED JUMPED 11â†’35 (Fear): The 46+ day extreme fear streak appears BROKEN. Yesterday's F&G was 8-11; today it recovered to 35. This is the first reading above 25 since early February. Signals potential sentiment inflection ahead of Thursday catalysts.

MARKET: BTC $70,602 (flat, holding above $70K support post-geopolitical relief rally). ETH ~$2,158. Total market cap ~$2.5T. Stablecoins $312B ATH. BTC dominance ~56.5%. Bernstein maintains $150K year-end target.

OPTIONS EXPIRY UPDATE: Thu Mar 27 â€” $13.5B total ($10.2B BTC + $3.3B ETH) on Deribit. Max pain $85K-$86K (BTC at $70.6K = significant gap, potential gravitational pull upward). Put/call ratio 0.85 (slightly bullish). Post-expiry 3-7 day window historically produces largest monthly moves.

DELTA SINCE v11: Build cycle shipped 2 new learn pages â€” Nasdaq Tokenized Equities Trading Guide 2026 (~3,100 words, SEC-approved pilot, DTC LedgerScan, T+0 settlement, Russell 1000 eligible) + Grayscale HYPE ETF Guide (~2,800 words, GHYP S-1 filing, Hyperliquid $6.2B TVL, 50%+ perps market share). Both added to PUBLISH_QUEUE.

Publish-v9 promoted Congressional Tokenization Hearing + BitGo IPO guides to PUBLISHED_PAGES (queue emptied, then refilled by build). Current PUBLISH_QUEUE: 2 items (Nasdaq Tokenized Equities + Grayscale HYPE ETF).

LOCAL METRICS: 1,174 page.tsx files (+2 from v11). 529 published slugs (+0 code-side, awaiting commit). 29 uncommitted files (8 modified + ~16 untracked + 5 new report files). 142 TS errors (stable â€” 119 in lido-v3-stvaults). index.lock persists since 09:58 UTC.

sections.title: Project Manager
items: đź”´ BLOCKER PERSISTS [P0]: git index.lock present since 09:58 UTC today. ALL new commits blocked. The 2 newly promoted pages (Congressional Tokenization + BitGo IPO) and 2 new build pages (Nasdaq + Grayscale) cannot reach production until: (1) rm .git/index.lock, (2) git add + commit, (3) Vercel redeploy. Jefe action required.

DONE SINCE v11: Build cycle shipped Nasdaq Tokenized Equities + Grayscale HYPE ETF (2 pages, ~5,900 words combined). Publish-v9 promoted Congressional Tokenization + BitGo IPO to PUBLISHED_PAGES. EOD-v11 ran full QA (142 TS errors, 6/6 API routes verified). Design-v11 + Community cycles completed.

PIPELINE STATUS: PUBLISH_QUEUE has 2 items ready for promotion. 529 published slugs. 426/529 have page.tsx (103 legacy gaps). 29 files pending commit. Today's cumulative: 22 learn guides built, 5 ecosystem pages, 24+ OG images, 33+ social posts, 28+ SVG cards, 49+ UX fixes.

CARRY-OVER [P1]: 103 published slugs missing page.tsx. Pendle ecosystem 'use client' metadata conflict. Rate limiter 0/6 routes. 142 TS errors (119 in lido-v3-stvaults alone â€” malformed JSX block at line 865).
CARRY-OVER [P2]: 17 duplicate slugs. ~120 learn pages missing OG images. F&G API data was 2 days stale (Mar 23) last cycle â€” upstream issue. /api/market-metrics was 404 in production.
TODAY'S AGENT RUNS: standupĂ—12, buildĂ—10, designĂ—11, communityĂ—10, publishĂ—9, eodĂ—11 = 63 total.

sections.title: CEO â€” Next Cycle Priorities
items: PRIORITY 1 â€” CLEAR index.lock + COMMIT + DEPLOY: This is the single highest-leverage action. 4 new learn pages (Congressional Tokenization, BitGo IPO, Nasdaq Tokenized Equities, Grayscale HYPE ETF) are built and publish-ready but trapped behind the lock. Every hour uncommitted = missed search capture. The sentiment shift (F&G 11â†’35) means retail attention is returning â€” our content needs to be live.

PRIORITY 2 â€” PROMOTE PUBLISH_QUEUE (BATCH 13): Nasdaq Tokenized Equities + Grayscale HYPE ETF should be promoted to PUBLISHED_PAGES immediately after index.lock clears. Both are time-sensitive: Nasdaq pilot approved Mar 18, Grayscale filed Mar 20, competitor content already ranking. Move from queue to published â†’ commit â†’ deploy.

PRIORITY 3 â€” THURSDAY CONVERGENCE PREP (36 hours): $13.5B options expiry + SEC 91 ETF rulings both hit Mar 27. With F&G recovering from extreme fear to fear, volatility and traffic spike likely. Ensure fear-greed-timeline, options-calculator, etf-guide, sec-digital-commodities-classification-guide are all reachable in production. Community has posts #133-138 scheduled. This could be our biggest traffic day if content is live.

STRATEGIC SIGNAL: The F&G recovery from 11â†’35 breaking the 46-day extreme fear streak is a potential macro inflection point. $312B stablecoins ATH = massive dry powder. Post-options-expiry window (Mar 28-Apr 3) historically sees sharp directional moves. If BTC reclaims $75K, search volume for crypto tools/guides spikes 3-5x. Our 529+ page surface area needs to be LIVE and indexed before that happens. The index.lock blocker is now the single biggest strategic risk to capturing this catalyst window.
